description: Interactive call-to-action content that invites audience participation through choices, comparisons, or product trials with direct engagement prompts.
structural_recipe: Lead with an engaging question or comparison (e.g., 'أيهم يستاهل الصدارة؟') or invitation to follow intuition. Follow with emoji markers and clear action prompts (جرّبوا، شاركونا). Include product/service reference with hashtags. Use casual, conversational Arabic that feels personal. End with downward arrow (👇) or question mark to direct comments.
why_it_works: Saudi audiences respond strongly to interactive content that makes them feel heard and valued. Direct invitations to share opinions and test products create psychological ownership and social proof. The casual tone ('اتبع إحساسك') appeals to younger demographics seeking authentic brand connection rather than hard-sell messaging.
transplantation_caveats: Avoid appearing too informal in luxury or B2B sectors
Ensure questions have clear context and aren't perceived as lazy engagement farming
Time product comparisons carefully—avoid during Ramadan if promoting indulgence products
